title: Broken System
description:
Yt Emac's own horror mode (Mods of Emac). 
This mod's 1.20.1 Forge version is the most advanced version of the first release. A mod that brings the power of Emacs and TeX to Minecraft, offering advanced tools for code editing. Download and enjoy ;)
body:
This mod is EmacMC: Mods of Emac first mod. This is a horror mod. Our goal is to make cool mods. Mod:Bedrocks, A, F, error and more.You can support us by subscribing:) Why isn't there a 1.0.1? Because in testing, 1.0.1 had the power to destroy a powerful computer, including breaking internet settings, preventing computer shutdowns, preventing restarts, preventing sleep mode, evading antiviruses, and more. 
This mod adds three characters, only one of which is in the mod's gallery. The first and most advanced mod includes loot and the easiest diamond-collecting material. 
For more information, head over to the Emac Network's web site. 1.0.1 beta:Please do not play this mod for more than an hour, as it may gain access to your computer and do things you don't want it to do.
